name: IRC_JA_NOTIF_OCCUR
description: This table is used to store the occurrences when a Job Application is moved to a given Phase/State for the review notification action configured in Candidate Selection Process.

columns.Name: JA_NOTIF_OCCUR_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key for the Table. System generated.

columns.Name: CURRENT_PHASE_ID
columns.Comments: Current Phase of Job Application for which this review notification action is invoked. Foreign Key to IRC_PHASES_B table.

columns.Name: CURRENT_STATE_ID
columns.Comments: Current State of Job Application for which this review notification action is invoked. Foreign Key to IRC_STATES_B table.

columns.Name: PUBLIC_STATE_ID
columns.Comments: This refers to public job application status that can be shared with candidate. Foreign Key to IRC_STATES_B table.

columns.Name: STEP_ACTION_USAGE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key IRC_STEP_ACTION_USAGES_B table. (Life cycle action context)

columns.Name: OCCURANCE_TIME
columns.Comments: Occurance time stamp when the action is invoked in Canddiate Selection process.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
